sections.paragraph:
ἐξερίζω 1 aor. ἐξήρισα (s. ἐρίζω, ἔρις; Plut., Pomp. 649 [56, 3]; Appian, Bell. Civ. 2, 151 §634) be factious, contentious ἐξήρισαν εἰς τοσοῦτο θυμοῦ carried their factiousness to such a pitch of fury 1 Cl 45:7.—DELG s.v. ἔρις.

aor. aor. = aorist

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 347
